headline: Geneva braces for Évian G7: cantonal parliament votes business-compensation fund, bypass motorway partly closed
summary: Geneva's Grand Conseil votes a fund for businesses disrupted by the nearby 15-17 June Évian G7 and partly closes its bypass motorway.

headline: Crans-Montana fire probe: Jessica Moretti now also charged with forgery over foam invoice
summary: A suspect in the deadly Crans-Montana fire is now also accused of falsifying an invoice for the flammable foam.

headline: Vaud: young-party president Jean-Robert Terrier ousted after attacking Valérie Dittli and Le Centre
summary: A Vaud cantonal party youth president is removed after criticizing State Councillor Valérie Dittli.

headline: Chopard to cut jobs in Val-de-Travers
summary: Swiss watchmaker Chopard plans job cuts at its Val-de-Travers site amid the watch downturn.

headline: Switzerland's 2030 emissions gap bigger than the federal government states
summary: SRF reports Switzerland's projected shortfall against 2030 climate targets is larger than official figures.

headline: Temu and Shein lose free deliveries to Switzerland as small-parcel tax takes effect
summary: A new Swiss tax on low-value parcels ends free shipping from Temu and Shein.

headline: US naval blockade has bled Iran of nearly $6bn in oil revenue, crude exports at record lows
summary: Iran's crude exports fell to record lows under a US blockade begun April 13 amid the wider Iran war.

headline: Iran inflation hits highest level since World War II; WFP warns war pushing millions toward hunger
summary: Iranian inflation surges to its worst since WWII as the UN WFP warns of mounting hunger.

headline: Ireland imposes travel ban on Israeli ministers Ben-Gvir and Smotrich
summary: Ireland's Taoiseach bars two far-right Israeli ministers from entry.

headline: US Senate passes $70bn ICE/CBP funding bill through Trump's term
summary: The full Senate passes a ~$70bn funding bill for ICE and CBP after months of delay.

headline: Ukrainian marine drone explodes at Romanian port, spurring spillover fears
summary: A Ukrainian naval drone detonates at a NATO-member Romanian Black Sea port.

headline: NASA tells ISS Crew-12 to ready for possible evacuation amid Zvezda module cracks
summary: NASA orders ISS astronauts to prepare for possible evacuation over cracks in the Russian Zvezda module.

headline: At least 49 die of thirst after truck breakdown in Niger desert
summary: Dozens of migrants die of thirst when their truck breaks down in the Niger desert.

headline: Joomla JCE editor CVE-2026-48907 allows unauthenticated PHP upload-and-execute (CVSS 10.0)
summary: A CVSS 10.0 flaw in Joomla's JCE editor lets unauthenticated users upload and run PHP.

headline: WooCommerce Product Slider Pro backdoor CVE-2026-49777 (CVSS 10.0), no clean versioned patch
summary: A CVSS 10.0 backdoor flaw in a WooCommerce plugin has only an in-place vendor fix.

headline: Chrome 149.0.7827.53 patches PDFium/DevTools/TabStrip memory-safety flaws
summary: Google ships Chrome 149 fixing multiple high-severity PDFium use-after-free and DevTools bugs.

headline: 7-Zip heap buffer overflow CVE-2026-48095 enables code execution via crafted NTFS archive
summary: A heap overflow in 7-Zip's NTFS handler (CVSS 8.8) can cause code execution.

headline: X.Org/Xwayland cluster CVE-2026-50256..50264 enables crash or root privilege escalation
summary: A batch of X.Org X server and Xwayland flaws (CVSS up to 7.8) enable crash or privilege escalation.

headline: Teltonika RUTOS CVE-2026-8914 eval injection escalates to root on routers
summary: An eval injection in Teltonika RUTOS routers allows command execution as root.

headline: HCL Digital Experience CVE-2026-21837 OS command injection in DAM API
summary: A command-injection flaw in HCL DX's Digital Asset Management API enables full system takeover.

headline: Steering vectors are an adversarial attack surface (arXiv 2606.05958)
summary: Poisoning 4-6% of a steering dataset silently turns a shared activation-steering vector into a jailbreak.

headline: SALT: when more GRPO rollouts don't help (arXiv 2606.05800)
summary: Extra RLVR rollouts cancel out under GRPO normalization; SALT reweights by gradient geometry.

headline: Less is MoE: trimming experts in domain-specialist LLMs (arXiv 2606.05538)
summary: Fisher-importance pruning of MoE FFN dimensions compresses experts without breaking general benchmarks.

headline: Multiplication-only matrix inversion for quantized Gated DeltaNet (arXiv 2606.06034)
summary: A truncated Neumann-series MatMul scheme removes the inversion bottleneck in linear-attention long-context models.

headline: Consistency training along the transformer stack (arXiv 2606.05817)
summary: New MLP/attention internal consistency targets reduce misalignment under several attack types.

headline: Compress-Distill: reasoning-trace compression for cheaper distillation (arXiv 2606.05988)
summary: Compressing chain-of-thought traces to ~10-20% length speeds distillation 2-7x and shortens outputs.
